canonical_definition: Benchmark suite assessing question-answering and reasoning tasks including MMLU, ARC-Challenge, GSM8k, HellaSwag, Winogrande, and TruthfulQA, using both log-likelihood and text-generation evaluations.
papers: Predicting Through Generation: Why Generation Is Better for Prediction
